name: koishi-plugin-ll-word-manage
description: Config-page table UI for managing koishi-plugin-word-core word libraries

description.zh: 在插件设置页用表格管理 word-core 词库。支持添加/编辑/删除词条，自动同步到 word-core 引擎。
description.en: Manage word-core libraries via config page table. Add/edit/delete entries, auto-sync to word-core engine.
